vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor
Subassembly within 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on harmonic drive due to insufficient cooling fin area.
risk.mit: Increase cooling fin surface area or add active cooling.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief at cable entry.
risk.mit: Implement robust strain relief geometry near cable entry.

risk.desc: Possible structural weakness at base plate due to thin material.
risk.mit: Thicken base plate material or reinforce with ribs.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to loose tolerance.
risk.mit: Reduce tolerance to IT5 or lower.

risk.desc: Potential for harmonic drive failure due to excessive torque.
risk.mit: Ensure harmonic drive is rated for 100Nm or higher.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

Load transfer from mounting flange to base plate
Heat dissipation from harmonic drive to cooling fins

integration_opportunities.description: Cable entry grommet allows easy cable replacement

Bolted connection to base plate for easy removal

verify.rule: All required fields are present.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on the shoulder joint due to high torque.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks and cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage during articulation due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure proper strain relief and slack loops for cables crossing joints.

risk.desc: Complex manufacturing process may lead to increased production costs.
risk.mit: Evaluate alternative manufacturing methods to balance cost and performance.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance in moving joints may cause binding or wear.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearances to ensure smooth operation and longevity.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment issues if datum visibility is compromised.
risk.mit: Ensure all primary datum faces and edges are clearly visible and labeled.

verify.rule: All required fields are present.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment between the upper arm link and shoulder/elbow joints due to lack of explicit alignment features.
risk.mit: Add alignment pins or datum features to ensure precise mating.

risk.desc: Insufficient evidence of fastener locking methods and preload intent may lead to joint failure over time.
risk.mit: Specify locking methods and preload torques for all critical joints.

risk.desc: Cable routing may become obstructed if the cable channel is not properly designed for full motion range.
risk.mit: Ensure cable channel design allows for full articulation of the arm without obstruction.

risk.desc: Service access may be limited if inspection windows are not strategically placed.
risk.mit: Place inspection windows in critical areas for easy access during maintenance.

risk.desc: Thermal management could be compromised if heat dissipation is not adequately addressed.
risk.mit: Include thermal management features such as fins or cooling channels in the design.
